mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chatbot_messages ( user_id, plant_id, question, answer, referenced_data, chart_spec, image_data, external_sources, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{plantId}, #{question}, #{answer}, CAST(#{referencedData} AS JSON),
CAST(#{chartSpec} AS JSON) NULL , #{imageDataUrl},
CAST(#{externalSources} AS JSON) NULL , #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.*, p.name AS plant_name FROM chatbot_messages cm LEFT JOIN plants p ON p.id = cm.plant_id WHERE cm.id = #{id}
